 Confirm. Slightly newer 7520g same problem with 7.0 and 7.1 beta.
 
 Dumps:
 
 7.0 (i386):
 
 int=3D00000006 err=3D00000000 efl=3D00010006 eip=3D00458a34
 
 Eax=3D00458a30 ebx=3D00458a30 ecx=3Da0000075 edx=3D00048890
 
 Esi=3D0006632c edi=3D0005c05c ebp=3D00092c84 esp=3D0009cc44
 
 Cs:0008 ds=3D0010 es=3D0010 fs=3D0010 gs=3D0010 ss=3D0010
 
 Cs:eip=3D0f c7 80 d4 00 00 00 00 =9600 00 00 b8 01 00 00 00
 
            Sd c3 8d 76 00 8d bc 27 =96 00 00 00 00 55 89 e5 5d
 
 Ss:esp=3D90 95 00 00 00 00 00 80 =96 75 00 00 a0 00 00 00 00
 
             00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 =96 90 88 09 00 00 00 14 01
 
 BTX halted
 
 
 
 7.0 (amd64):
 
 The problem occurs right before the boot menu but I cannot submit the dump
 
 Because it scrolls too fast (all I can make out is "BTX halted")
 
 
 
 7.1beta (i386&AMD64):
 
 Int=3D0000000d err=3D0000447c efl=3D00010002 eip=3D0045c522
 
 Eax=3D0045c520 ebx=3D0045c520 ecx=3Da0000075 edx=3D000498a0
 
 Esi=3D00067dec edi=3D0005d05c ebp=3D00092c84 esp=3D000093fa
 
 Cs=3D0008 ds=3D0010 es=3D0010 fs=3D0010 gs=3D0010 ss=3D0010
 
 Cs:eip=3D9a 98 54 00 80 7f 44 08 =96 75 4c 83 7d e8 11 75 26
 
            8b 57 08 83 7f 0c 00 75 =96 0c 83 c2 30 ed 0d 00 00
 
 Ss:esp=3D 36 80 0d 07 90 00 00 01 =96 e9 cb fc ff ff aa ac 84
 
               C0 0f 84 86 00 00 00 a8 =96 80 74 f2 88 c5 b0 3d aa
 
 BTX halted
 
 
 
 Also there seems to be an ACPI issue with this laptop because the dump is
 preceded by:
 
 "
 
 ACPI autoload failed =96 no such file or directory
 
 |
 
 "
 
 Except of course the no acpi option.
